softwareSolutionsHouseLp.heroTitle:
Custom Software Development & Digital Transformation Services in Dubai
Partnering with UAE Businesses since 2003
softwareSolutionsHouseLp.heroSubText:
emQube fulfills the digital transformation goals of your organization with a complete range of software services. Whether you need a customized software system developed from scratch, the integration of powerful SaaS solutions, or a hybrid of both, we deliver.

Our engagement begins with expert software consulting and extends through development, seamless integration, and dedicated ongoing support.

sftSdPages.spDescription: Build bespoke software applications tailored to your specific operational requirements with zero licensing costs.
Create high-performance mobile applications for your business or startup on robust iOS, Android, and Hybrid platforms.
Integrate your business systems with WhatsApp for Business to automate customer acquisition, transactions, and support.
Leverage AI Agents, LLMs, and GenAI services to automate complex tasks and execute intelligent workflows across departments.
Rely on Intelligent MIS to make data-driven decisions with visual dashboards and insightful reports on PowerBI, Tableau, and QlikSense.
Go online with e-commerce platforms tailored to your business model on robust systems like Magento, WooCommerce, and Shopify.

softwareSolutionsHouseLp.spTitle: Specialized Software Products for UAE Enterprises

sftSpPages.spDescription: Configure leading tools such as Zoho CRM and Salesforce, or our fully customizable SalesPro for local sales cycles.
Digitally transform your business with versatile ERPs built on Odoo or Zoho One for a unified system.
Optimize your FM services with CAFM Pro, our proprietary solution built specifically for the FM industry.
Manage attendance and disburse payroll with overtime calculations via HRMS Pro, built for teams of 200+.
Enhance daily output with the 135 Pro To-Do Planner, featuring managerial overview and priority control.

sftScPages.spDescription: Achieve your long-term objectives by relying on our deep understanding of business processes and emerging technologies.
Launch your Minimum Viable Product (MVP) with expert UI/UX services supplemented by our decades of technical expertise.

sftWcuContent.wcuDescription: Deeper insights of business processes and requirements
Committed to deliver the right solutions on time
Our estimate is based on effort, not opportunity.

sftEmSteps.emText: Building from scratch or configuring pre-packaged solutions.
Rigorous testing to ensure a bug-free, fit-for-purpose solution.
Secure production release and comprehensive user training.

selectProjects.content: emQube developed a dedicated workflow application that enables automotive regional headquarters to track, monitor, and resolve customer service escalations from local service centers.
selectProjects.title: Automotive Customer Escalation Portal

selectProjects.content: emQube engineered a centralized web-based portal to manage MIS, inventory, and forecasting across 11 countries for a luxury automotive regional office.
selectProjects.title: Automotive Regional Sales & Inventory Portal

selectProjects.content: emQube built an integrated online portal allowing insurance brokers to manage, compare, and issue policies from multiple insurance providers for their customers.
selectProjects.title: Multi-Provider Insurance Aggregator Portal

selectProjects.content: emQube developed a comprehensive web-based platform to streamline the scheduling, tracking, and financial administration of Key Opinion Leader (KOL) interactions.
selectProjects.title: Pharma Expert Engagement Platform

selectProjects.content: emQube engineered a comprehensive reporting tool that consolidates multi-country sales and inventory data for a Swiss coffee company’s Middle East regional office
selectProjects.title: Regional Sales & Stock Consolidation Tool
